name: Dusty
short_description: Dusty is a fast-paced multiplayer shooter where strategy and skill determine victory. Join intense battles in Capture the Flag, Team Deathmatch, and Free for All, with more modes coming soon. Choose your team, fight for dominance, and experience adrenaline-fueled combat!
detailed_description:
Dusty is an intense multiplayer shooter where strategy, teamwork, and skill come together for thrilling combat. Players are divided into two fierce teams, Phantom and Blaze, battling it out across a variety of game modes: Capture the Flag, Team Deathmatch, and Free for All(More gamemodes will be added).

In Capture the Flag, players work together to outmaneuver and outsmart the enemy team to secure the flag and score points. Team Deathmatch challenges each team to dominate the battlefield, trying to get more kills than enemy. For those who prefer the chaos of solo combat, Free for All throws players into an all-out battle, where it's every player for themselves.

Whether you're a tactician coordinating with teammates or a lone wolf aiming to be the last one standing, Dusty offers fast-paced action, intense firefights, and a variety of strategies to keep you on the edge of your seat. Join the fight, choose your team, and prove your dominance in the ultimate arena!

supported_languages: English, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish
